ui.title: EE Action / Workflow Widget
ui.desc: Simplify pending tasks filterable by module type (financing, doc review) with workflow action items.

data.sql: SELECT C_MAIN_REF as "Reference", C_USER_ID as "Assignee", 'LC Document Review' as "Task_Type", TO_CHAR(D_CREA_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "Created" FROM %EXIMTRX%.IPLC_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' UNION ALL SELECT C_MAIN_REF, C_USER_ID, 'Financing Approval', TO_CHAR(D_CREA_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM %EXIMTRX%.FADA_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' AND ROWNUM <= 5
